chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَطُوفُ فَتَعْرِضُ لَهُ الْحَاجَةُ أَوِ الْعِلَّةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 129 – The man performs Tawaaf, so a need presents itself to him, or an illness

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن وموافق للمشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/33)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن وموافق للمشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/33)
text: الرَّجُلِ يُحْدِثُ فِي طَوَافِ الْفَرِيضَةِ وَ قَدْ طَافَ بَعْضَهُ قَالَ يَخْرُجُ فَيَتَوَضَّأُ فَإِنْ كَانَ جَازَ النِّصْفَ بَنَى عَلَى طَوَافِهِ وَ إِنْ كَانَ أَقَلَّ مِنَ النِّصْفِ أَعَادَ الطَّوَافَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws) regarding the man who excretes wind during the Obligatory Tawaaf, and he had circumambulated part of it. Heasws said: ‘He should go out and perform ablution. So if he had completed the half, he would build upon his Tawaaf; and if it was less than half, he would repeat the Tawaaf’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, (abu Ja’far or abu ‘Abd Allah), ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has said, Tf during obligatory Tawaf one’s wudu’ becomes invalid when he has performed a certain parts of Tawaf. he must take wudu’, and if he has performed more than half of Tawaf; he can continue from where he has left; but if what is performed is less than half he must perform Tawaf again.’”
